query: I have a 1:1 with Sarah tomorrow morning, she's been really quiet the past two weeks and missed her last two daily check-ins. Her sentiment seems to be dropping. How should I approach the conversation?
我团队里有个菲律宾员工最近情绪很低落，连续三天没交日报了。作为管理者我该怎么跟他沟通比较合适？需要考虑文化差异
Give me a morning briefing — what's important today? I want to see top risks, any blocked tasks, and who hasn't checked in yet

David has been with us 2 years as a senior engineer, solid technically but not great at cross-team communication. He wants to be promoted to engineering lead. Should I do it? What would Elon Musk say about this?

I manage 8 people across Singapore and Manila offices. One of my Manila team members consistently underperforms but always has excuses. How do I give direct feedback without being culturally insensitive?
帮我用稻盛和夫的利他哲学设计每周签到问题，我的团队有12个人，主要是开发和设计
Show me this week's risk dashboard — I want to know what's blocking my team, any overdue tasks, and who might be overloaded. Sort by severity.
We're thinking about expanding into the Japan market next quarter. Can you run a virtual board meeting? I want to hear what my CFO, CTO, and CMO would each think about this move.

One of my devs, Alex, has been missing deadlines for the past 3 sprints. His daily reports show he's struggling with a blocker but hasn't escalated it. What's the best way to address this without micromanaging?
Generate a weekly team performance report. I want to see check-in rates, who's doing well, who might need support, and KPIs vs targets. Make it concise, I hate long reports.
Help me write a Python FastAPI backend that sends Slack webhook notifications when our CI pipeline fails on GitHub Actions. I need the endpoint and the webhook handler.
I need to build an employee management CRUD app with Vue 3 and a Go Gin backend — basic employee list, add/edit/delete, with a PostgreSQL database. Can you scaffold it?
How do I set up a cron job on Ubuntu to automatically backup my PostgreSQL database to S3 every night at 2am? I'm using pg_dump and aws cli.
Can you review this pull request? It changes the authentication middleware in our Express API to use JWT refresh tokens instead of session cookies. Here's the diff: ...
I want to build a Telegram bot in Python with aiogram that tracks when employees clock in and out. It should store timestamps in Postgres and generate weekly attendance reports.
How do I configure the Notion API to create a two-way sync with my PostgreSQL database? I need webhooks for when pages change and a batch import script.
Write me a comprehensive performance review template as a Google Doc — sections for goals achieved, areas of improvement, peer feedback, and development plan. Just the template structure.
I need to set up Grafana dashboards connected to Prometheus to monitor our Kubernetes cluster — CPU, memory, pod restarts, and custom application metrics.
Help me design a PostgreSQL schema for a multi-tenant SaaS HR system — employees, departments, leave requests, payroll. I need the CREATE TABLE statements and indexes.
What's the best way to implement role-based access control in my Go API? I'm using Gin and need middleware that checks user roles against route permissions stored in Redis.
